summary: The claim states that in occlusion, the teeth have [specific characteristic]. By analyzing different types of contacts—such as edge-to-edge, cusp-to-cusp, marginal, and surface-to-surface—I concluded that surface-to-surface contact best represents ideal occlusion because it allows for even force distribution across all tooth surfaces. Other forms either focus on limited areas or are associated with malocclusions. Thus, the most accurate choice is D.

Other forms either focus on limited areas or are associated with malocclusions. Thus, the most accurate choice is D.. Answer choice: C
